description_long: This jewelry object is a flat, circular piece featuring an intricate geometric mosaic pattern. The design consists of concentric rings of triangles and polygons, radiating outward from a central starburst motif. The outermost ring is composed of dark green triangles, while the inner rings alternate between shades of gray, white, and muted purple. The surface appears smooth and polished, with sharp, clean lines separating each colored segment. The overall appearance is reminiscent of a decorative medallion or pendant, with a modern, abstract aesthetic. The object is thin and disk-like, suggesting it is designed to be worn flat against the body.
description: A flat, circular jewelry piece with a detailed geometric mosaic pattern in green, gray, white, and purple. The design features concentric rings and a central starburst motif.
description_view_0: The jewelry is seen from above, displaying the full geometric mosaic pattern and all color segments clearly.
description_view_1: This view is nearly identical to view 0, showing the flat, circular form and the intricate pattern from a slightly rotated angle.
description_view_2: The object remains flat and circular, with the geometric design and color distribution unchanged from previous views.
description_view_3: Again, the jewelry is viewed from above with the same clear display of the geometric motif and color arrangement.
